# Update Email Address

Customers can update their email address by accessing the profile settings page. After submitting the new email, a confirmation message is sent, and the change will only be finalized once the link in that message is followed. Until the new address is verified, the old email will still receive order notifications.

[Source: account_management.md#update-email-address]
